# Cameo

Originally, Drenodir appeared briefly in [A Child’s Fairytale World](../Products/A%20Child%E2%80%99s%20Fairytale%20World%20c368a02eabb74a47ab322615f2769723.md) in [James in the Asylum courtroom](../../Scenes/James%20in%20the%20Asylum%20courtroom%202ba58e628ba28012b79fc25e706d22f3.md). referred to as “The nurse’s husband”.  That plot was cut but I’m considering adding some of it back.

# Re-evaluation

From paladin, to father, general, soldier, and now mainly an innkeeper, this character has changed significantly enough over the years that I feel I need to take a step back and re-evaluate exactly what the purpose and role of Drenodir is.
